data.job_title: Senior Data Platform Engineer - Remote - Latin America
data.description:
**About FullStack**
FullStack is the most transparent IT talent network, connecting highly skilled individuals with top global companies and Silicon Valley startups for remote, on-demand projects. We focus on building a trusted, high-performance network where talent can thrive in a positive, respectful, and supportive environment. By prioritizing transparency, fair opportunities, and professional growth, we empower our engineers to deliver their best work while collaborating with innovative teams worldwide.
  
  
**We’re Most Proud Of**

- Offering life-changing opportunities for talented software professionals across the Americas.
- Enhancing highly-skilled software development teams of hundreds of the world’s greatest companies.
- Our 4.2-star rating on GlassDoor.
- Our client Net Promoter Score of 68, twice the industry average.

**The Opportunity**
Join our talent network and connect with U.S. clients for flexible, project-based development work as a Senior Data Platform Engineer.
  
  

- You will integrate directly into our client's team and work alongside their existing designers and engineers on a daily basis.

**What We're Looking For**

- 5+ years of professional experience in Data Engineering, Platform Engineering, or DevOps.
- Advanced English is required.
- Successful completion of a four-year college degree is required.
- Hands-on experience administering Databricks in AWS environments.
- Strong experience with Terraform and Infrastructure as Code at scale.
- Deep familiarity with GitHub Actions or comparable CI/CD tooling.
- Experience building reusable CI/CD frameworks (not just individual pipelines).
- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL.
- Deep understanding of distributed data processing and the Spark execution model.
- Experience supporting DBT workflows and analytics engineering teams.
- Strong understanding of SDLC best practices and multi-environment promotion strategies.
- Experience designing enterprise-scale data platforms.
- Knowledge of IAM best practices in AWS.
- Familiarity with data governance, compliance, and audit requirements.
- Experience implementing automated quality gates and testing in CI/CD pipelines.
- AWS and Databricks certifications are a plus.
- Ability to work through new and difficult issues and contribute to libraries as needed.
- Ability to create and maintain continuous integration and delivery of applications.
- Forensic attention to detail.
- A positive mindset and a can-do attitude.
- Experience working on Agile / Scrum teams.
- Meaningful experience working on large, complex systems.
- Ability to take extreme ownership over your work. Every day is a challenge to ensure you are performing to the expectations you and your team have agreed upon.
- Ability to identify with the goals of FullStack's clients, and dedicate yourself to delivering on the commitments you and your team make to them.
- Ability to consistently work 40 hours per week.

**What We Offer**

- Competitive pay.
- 100% remote work.
- The ability to work with leading startups and Fortune 500 companies.
- Continuing education opportunities.
- Opportunity to grow and expand your career.

Our talent network is committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and accessible environment where IT professionals can find opportunities that match their skills. We welcome individuals of all races, religions, genders, sexual orientations, national origins, abilities, and experiences. Our focus is on connecting talent with projects based on qualifications, ensuring a fair and transparent process that values diverse perspectives and global collaboration.
  
  
Learn more about our Applicants Privacy Notice.

company_object.name: FullStack
company_object.long_description:
FullStack is a leading software engineering and AI solutions company helping organizations modernize, innovate, and scale through intelligent technology and world-class AI-ready talent across the Americas.

We partner with global enterprises to accelerate digital transformation by combining deep technical expertise with a flexible nearshore delivery model that ensures speed, quality, and collaboration. Our teams design and build modern, scalable platforms powered by AI, automation, and human creativity.

With more than a decade of experience and 700+ professionals, FullStack delivers end-to-end capabilities in product engineering, application modernization, data and AI integration, and experience design. From startups to Fortune 500 companies, clients trust us to translate bold ideas into intelligent, high-impact software solutions.

Our mission is to build technology that moves business forward and to empower the people who make it possible.

data.description:
**Golang Data Engineer #2613**

**Position Summary:**

Our partner is a quantitative trading organization where live market data, low-latency systems, and proprietary models directly drive capital allocation decisions. As the platform continues to scale, the team is adding a senior engineer to own the real-time streaming ingestion systems that power live trading. You’ll build production-grade Go services that consume live WebSocket feeds, process and time-slice high-throughput market data, and deliver reliable inputs to a C-based trading engine running on AWS. The focus is demanding and meaningful: streaming reliability, automated failover, observability, and production debugging in a latency-sensitive environment where performance and correctness directly impact outcomes. If you enjoy building systems where milliseconds matter and your work influences real capital in motion, this is engineering at its sharpest.

**Experience and Education:**

- BS in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering or equivalent hands-on experience/field
- Hands-on experience building production-grade distributed system for real-time or streaming environments
- Strong production experience developing backend or systems services in Go
- Experience implementing WebSocket-based live data ingestion
- Experience deploying and operating services on AWS, specifically EC2 and S3
- Experience building and deploying containerized services, ideally in Kubernetes environments
- Experience supporting low-latency, high-availability systems where downtime or delay had direct business impact

**Skills and Strengths:**

- Go
- Real-time streaming systems
- WebSockets
- Low-latency architecture
- Production service development
- AWS EC2
- AWS S3
- Kubernetes
- Containerization
- Monitoring
- Observability
- Prometheus
- High-throughput data processing
- Failover design
- Distributed systems
- Debugging live production systems
- Time-series data handling
- Data pipeline development
- Concurrency patterns
- Systems reliability engineering

**Primary Job Responsibilities:**

- Rebuild and own the production-grade, real-time market data ingestion system end-to-end
- Develop high-performance Go services that consume live market data over WebSockets
- Process and manage high-throughput streaming data across approximately 1,500 equities
- Aggregate and time-slice streaming data for accurate downstream model consumption
- Deliver structured, low-latency data feeds to a C-based trading engine running on AWS EC2
- Design and implement automatic failover from live market feeds to delayed backup streams
- Ensure data integrity and correctness during feed transitions and recovery scenarios
- Maintain and validate the historical data ingestion pipeline sourcing from AWS S3
- Instrument services with monitoring and observability to detect latency spikes, data gaps, and system degradation
- Debug and resolve live production streaming failures with minimal business disruption
- Optimize ingestion services for latency, throughput, and fault tolerance
- Deploy and operate containerized services within cloud-native environments
- Collaborate directly with technical leadership on architectural decisions and performance tradeoffs
- Operate independently without daily direction, taking full ownership of reliability and delivery
- Continuously improve system resilience to support live trading without manual intervention

company_object.long_description:
Ranger Technical Resources is a leading Technology Solutions and Staffing Firm. From our beginning in 1996, our unique process is what has made us the most trusted, innovative, and responsive IT Solutions Company to our clients. We are held in the highest regard for consistently providing quality solutions. We strive to be a dependable, cost-effective solution to our clients' IT Solutions, IT Consulting, and IT Staffing needs. Our goal is to maintain excellence by providing superior client service, a quality recruitment process, and effective solutions. Ranger is committed to developing each relationship to its fullest potential and continues to go the extra mile by providing value long after the business transaction is completed. It is for that reason that Ranger Technical Resources has become a leader in the Technical Recruiting Industry.

Check out our Facebook page at www.facebook.com/rangertechnical
Follow us on Twitter at www.twitter.com/rangertechnical
Circle us on Google Plus at https://plus.google.com/108730248546219818943

data.job_title: ANALISTA BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE SR - AZUL VIAGENS
data.description:
Toda vez que olhar para o céu para sonhar, nós estaremos lá. #OCéuÉAzul

Já pensou em continuar decolando sua carreira na Melhor Companhia Aérea do Mundo?

  

O Analista de Business IntelIigence (BI) Sr, irá apoiar o time através da extração e tratamento de dados, criação de dashboards e gestão dos principais KPIs da área.

Será responsável por traduzir dados em insights acionáveis, colaborar com equipes de outras áreas para implementar planos de ação e colher aprendizados, criar diagnósticos para identificar tendências do mercado e oportunidades de melhoria, além de projeções de vendas e análises de orçamento para subsidiar informações à gestão na tomada de decisão.

 **Responsabilidades e atribuições**

**Como será seu dia a dia:**

**﻿**

O Tripulante integrará o time de **Azul Viagens** em nossa matriz **MTZ**, que fica localizada em **Barueri/ SP.**

  

- Extração, limpeza e modelagem de dados;
- Desenvolvimento e gestão de dashboards no Power BI;
- Desenvolvimento das documentações de querys e relatórios;
- Gestão das metas e KPIs de toda a área;
- Elaboração de análises de performance, identificando gargalos e oportunidades;
- Participação em reuniões com times internos (TI, CRM, Produtos e Comercial) para melhoria de processos e alinhamento de estratégias.

 **Requisitos e qualificações**

**O que precisa trazer na Bagagem (Pré-requisitos):**

- Conhecimento avançado em ferramentas de análise, interpretação e modelagem de dados (SQL, Excel, Power BI, Phyton, Snowflake);
- Habilidade de comunicação eficaz com stakeholders em todos os níveis do negócio;
- Capacidade analítica para investigar, estruturar e resolver problemas complexos;
- Experiência na gestão de indicadores de negócios (faturamento, margem, forecast, ticket médio, custos, entre outros);
- Experiência com análises de planejamento e estratégia.

**Será um diferencial se tiver:**

  

- Conhecimento em metodologias ágeis;
- Disponibilidade para atuar de forma híbrida de 2 a 3x/semana em Alphaville/SP.

**Curtiu nosso desafio? Inscreva-se**

**Embarque nessa com a gente e venha decolar na sua carreira!**

#vemserAzul

 **Informações adicionais**

**Tripulante Azul** (colaborador), comunique seu gestor sobre o seu interesse e participação no processo seletivo. **Na etapa de Cadastro**, no campo: **Indicado por** será necessário que insira o **Nome e e-mail (Azul) do seu gestor**. Desta forma ele ficará ciente da formalização da sua candidatura.

Somos uma empresa de Pessoas para Pessoas com mais de 15 mil Tripulantes apaixonados em cuidar dos nossos Clientes e conectar pessoas por meio de experiências únicas.

A nossa história começou em dezembro de 2008 e, hoje, somos a maior companhia aérea em número de cidades atendidas no Brasil, com mais de 130 destinos nacionais e internacionais.

**Nossa Visão:**

Construir juntos a melhor companhia aérea do mundo.

**Nossa Missão:**

Fazer com esse seja o melhor emprego da minha vida e que nosso Cliente tenha o melhor voo da sua.

**Os nossos valores:**

São a base para a cultura da Azul, guiando e inspirando a maneira como trabalhamos todos os dias.

**Segurança |** Nada é mais importante.

**Consideração |** Trate o outro como ele gostaria de ser tratado. Observe, Perceba e Atenda (OPA).

**Integridade |** Seja um exemplo do bem.

**Paixão |** Ame o que faz.

**Inovação |** Esteja aberto e faça cada dia melhor.

**Excelência |** Seja impecável no que faz.

**O Respeito é a base dos nossos valores!**

Acreditamos que diversidade vai além de perfis: ela amplia olhares, enriquece decisões e constrói um ambiente mais justo para todos. Por isso, nossos processos seletivos são conduzidos com base na equidade e no compromisso de garantir oportunidades reais, sem distinção de raça, cor, gênero, orientação sexual, nacionalidade, deficiência, idade, classe social, religião ou qualquer outro fator que compõe quem você é.

**Programas e parcerias de Saúde & Bem-Estar que a Azul oferece a você e sua família (para Tripulantes CLT)**

**Anjo Azul** - Nosso programa que cuida dos Tripulantes, com atendimento psicossocial, jurídico e financeiro.

**Cegonha Azul** - Programa que cuida das gestantes e mamães até o primeiro ano de vida do bebê. Válido para Tripulantes e dependentes.

**Wellhub** **e TotalPass**

**Programa Antitabagismo**

**NutriAzul** - Acompanhamento Nutricional

**Zenklub** – terapia online para cuidar da sua saúde mental.

**SEST SENAT** - Cursos gratuitos, centros de convivência, assistência odontológica, fisioterapia, nutricionistas e psicólogos.

**Concierge -** Todos os nossos benefícios de bem-estar na palma da sua mão.

**Desconto em farmácias**

**Desenvolvemos sua carreira com:**

Papos para o Futuro com sua liderança.

Plano de desenvolvimento individual.

Treinamentos na nossa Universidade Corporativa - Uniazul.

Incentivos à educação para graduação, pós-graduação e idiomas por meio de parcerias com diversas instituições.

**Ajudar faz parte da nossa essência!**

Atuar de forma socialmente responsável está conectado com a nossa essência. Afinal, estamos presentes em todo o território brasileiro, com mais de 130 bases, e nos preocupamos com o desenvolvimento social do país. Por isso, unimos a nossa estratégia de negócio à nossa essência de ter as pessoas como foco da nossa Cultura, em um movimento que transforma o nosso país: o Programa de Voluntariado Azul.

Hoje, somamos mais de 7 mil Tripulantes voluntários que conectam pessoas e transformam vidas.

**Se identificou? Embarque nesse voo com a gente!** **#OCéudoBrasiléAzul**

data.description:
Come Join the LSEG team!
  
  
Are you passionate about designing new solutions? Do you thrive in a fast-paced, creative environment where innovation meets real-world use cases? Do you want to be part of a diverse, global team working with clients across Banking and financial services? If so, we invite you to join our
**Innovation Team (part of Customer Consulting Group of LSEG)**
as a
**Cloud Engineer**
, where you will play a critical role in bringing our clients' ideas to life.
  
  
We are looking for someone
**who is a an expert on either Azure or AWS and has extensive software development skill to design, develop and optimizing cloud-based infrastructures**
that power innovative applications, which fulfill our client’s requirements.
  
  
**5-point Summary**

- Architect & Deploy Scalable Cloud Solutions – Design and implement secure, high-performance cloud infrastructures across AWS or Azure, ensuring scalability and reliability.
- Automate & Optimize Cloud Workflows – Leverage Terraform (IaC), CloudFormation, and scripting to automate cloud deployments, optimize performance, and reduce operational overhead.
- Collaborate & Bring Innovation to life – Work with Architects, Developers, Consultants & Project Managers to develop innovative cloud-native solutions that are built using Design Thinking Approach.
- Undertake Agile Development & Cloud Governance – Strong experience in Python, Java, .NET or JavaScript while ensuring standard methodologies in CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure governance, API integration and governance.
- Must Have – Certified Cloud DevOps, self-sufficient in coding & scripting, exposure to Agile or Design Thinking methodology

**What You’ll Do**

- Cloud Architecture & Design

- Architect & Implement: Serve as the Cloud Expert, designing and implementing cloud-based solutions for LSEG innovation projects from concept to code.
- Cloud Automation: Automate data ingestion from existing LSEG products into Azure or AWS databases.
- Data Stitching: Automate data stitching practices centered around proprietary identifier methodology.
- Application Development: Build client-facing applications to visualize datasets and enable seamless data exploration.
- API Integration: Develop integrations for Windows, Linux, and database environments.
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Utilize Terraform, CloudFormation, or equivalent tools to automate and manage cloud resources.

- Cloud Monitoring & Optimization

- Manage & Support: Provision and be responsible for AWS / Azure cloud resources to monitor and support innovation projects.
- Incident Management: Diagnose and triage issues affecting client access to cloud-based products.
- Cost Optimization: Implement best practices to optimize cloud costs while ensuring high availability.
- Security & Compliance: Ensure all solutions adhere to LSEG security policies, infrastructure best practices, and industry compliance standards.
- Governance & Policies: Implement security frameworks using AWS/Azure policy frameworks and Open Policy Agent (OPA).

**Day to Day Activities**

- Organize, execute, and meet development requirements aligned with client demands.
- Participate in internal and external client meetings, collaborating with consultants and sales teams in the innovation ideation process.
- Work closely with cross-functional teams to streamline and innovate cloud practices that meet client requirements.
- Client-first mindset with a strong focus on innovation and problem-solving.
- Embrace a 'fail-fast' strategy to drive iterative improvement and innovation.

**Required Skills (Must Have)**

- Proven experience (5+ years) in Software development or Cloud DevOps in Financial Services & Banking Sector
- Programming & Scripting: Strong experience in Python, Java, .NET or JavaScript.
- Cloud DevOps Certification: AWS or Azure DevOps Certification is a must.
- Extensive Software Development and engineering experience, with Agile based delivery
- Collaboration skills with partner teams
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English) is required.

**Technical Knowledge**
(Must have)
  
  

- Terraform Expertise: Deep proficiency in Terraform (IaC) — you should consider yourself an expert.
- Software Development & Code Management: Familiarity with GIT, Source Code Management, Visual Studio, UML (Universal Model Language).
- API Development: Experience working with REST, RESTful, and SOAP APIs.
- Development Tooling: Experience with Confluence, Jira, and CI/CD pipelines to track and automate software delivery

**Desired Skills**

- Deep data/content expertise and know-how around market data content
- Ability to explore and understand clients' data requirements to architecture and build the best solution.
- Experience in any of the LSEG products/solutions is a plus
- Agile Development: Certified Scrum Developer or equivalent agile certification is an advantage.
- Experience in Design Thinking based product development
- Possess a strong understanding of real-time data, quantitative databases, and identifier mapping methodologies.
- Have a working knowledge of ML, AI, and predictive modeling.
- Data science background is a plus.
- Prior experience working with quantitative databases, APIs, and data feeds.

**Qualification**

- Undergraduate university degree or Higher in Computer Science

**Certifications**

- Cloud certification in either AWS or Azure (AWS Cloud practitioner or equivalent being the minimum requirement)
- Python programmer certification (PCEP – Certified Entry-Level Python Programmer or equivalent will be required)

**Why Join Us?**

- Innovate & Lead: Work on high-impact projects that push the boundaries of cloud technology.
- Global Impact: Build and lead cloud solutions for enterprise clients worldwide.
- Continuous Learning: Access to certifications, training, and mentorship to accelerate your career.
- Creative Freedom: We encourage experimentation and the exploration of new cloud technologies.
- Competitive Benefits: Attractive salary, flexible work environment, and comprehensive perks.

LSEG is a leading global financial markets infrastructure and data provider. Our purpose is driving financial stability, empowering economies and enabling customers to create sustainable growth.
  
  
Our purpose is the foundation on which our culture is built. Our values of
**Integrity, Partnership**
,
**Excellence**
and
**Change**
underpin our purpose and set the standard for everything we do, every day. They go to the heart of who we are and guide our decision making and everyday actions.
  
  
Working with us means that you will be part of a dynamic organisation of 25,000 people across 65 countries. However, we will value your individuality and enable you to bring your true self to work so you can help enrich our diverse workforce. You will be part of a collaborative and creative culture where we encourage new ideas and are committed to sustainability across our global business. You will experience the critical role we have in helping to re-engineer the financial ecosystem to support and drive sustainable economic growth. Together, we are aiming to achieve this growth by accelerating the just transition to net zero, enabling growth of the green economy and creating inclusive economic opportunity.
  
  
LSEG offers a range of tailored benefits and support, including healthcare, retirement planning, paid volunteering days and wellbeing initiatives.
  
  
We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. This means that we do not discriminate on the basis of anyone’s race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. Conforming with applicable law, we can reasonably accommodate applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs.
  
  
Please take a moment to read this privacy notice carefully, as it describes what personal information London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) (we) may hold about you, what it’s used for, and how it’s obtained, your rights and how to contact us as a data subject.
  
  
If you are submitting as a Recruitment Agency Partner, it is essential and your responsibility to ensure that candidates applying to LSEG are aware of this privacy notice.

company_object.name: LSEG
company_object.long_description:
LSEG (London Stock Exchange Group) is a diversified international markets infrastructure business —earning our clients’ trust for over 300 years. That legacy of customer-focused excellence ensures that you can rely on our expertise in capital formation, intellectual property and risk and balance sheet management. 

As global leaders in financial indexing, benchmarking and analytic services, we offer unrivalled access to international capital markets. Our high-performance technology solutions enable companies worldwide to access funds for growth and development. And with our Data & Analytics, Capital Markets and Post Trade divisions, we provide a comprehensive, integrated suite of trusted financial market infrastructure services that help our customers pursue—and achieve—their ambitions. 

You can count on our open access model for unparalleled partnership, flexibility, stability, and support across all of our businesses. That’s how we make a difference— ensuring people can meet their potential—worldwide.

company_object.name: Acerto
company_object.long_description:
Somos uma empresa de tecnologia que está transformando o mercado de recuperação de crédito. Fundada em 2017, nossa missão é ajudar milhões de brasileiros a conquistarem o bem-estar financeiro de forma simples e acessível.

Com uma solução inovadora de negociação de dívidas, colocamos o consumidor no centro do processo, oferecendo autonomia para regularizar sua situação financeira com diversas empresas em menos de 5 minutos.

Sabemos que o futuro não é apenas algo a ser esperado — é algo que construímos por meio de inovação, impacto positivo e colaboração.

Valorizamos a busca incessante pelo aprendizado e a ambição de ir além, porque acreditamos que a excelência nasce da combinação de talento, resultado e propósito. Queremos crescer ao lado de pessoas que compartilham nossa paixão por transformar vidas por meio da tecnologia.

Conheça mais sobre nossa cultura, nossas oportunidades e como você pode fazer parte dessa transformação: https://acerto.com.br/sobre-nos/carreiras
company_object.seo_description: O jeito certo e fácil de negociar suas dívidas. 💚

company_object.name: Compass UOL
company_object.long_description:
Compasso UOL is a Brazilian technology company owned by the UOL Group, which offers technology services, and provides state-of-the-art solutions, contributing to the digital transformation of its customers so they can become leaders in its sectors of activity.
Compasso UOL is a company that cultivates people's talent and use state-of-the-art technologies such as Agile Development, Multicloud, Data&Analytics, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning, APIs/Microservices, IoT and others, providing technology and knowledge that help customers in building digital solutions that enable the transformation and evolution of their business.

hiring_team.role: Headhunter | Workforce Planning & Development | HR Analytics | Sr Analyst, HR Ops & Talent Acquisition at Whirlpool Corporation

data.description:
**ID da Requisição:**
70502

**About Whirlpool Corporation**

Whirlpool Corporation (NYSE: WHR) is a leading home appliance company, in constant pursuit of improving life at home. As the only major U.S.-based manufacturer of kitchen and laundry appliances, the company is driving meaningful innovation to meet the evolving needs of consumers through its iconic brand portfolio, including
*Whirlpool*
,
*KitchenAid*
,
*JennAir, Maytag*
,
*Amana,*
*Brastemp*
,
*Consul*
, and
*InSinkErator*
. In 2024, the company reported approximately $17 billion in annual sales - close to 90% of which were in the Americas - 44,000 employees, and 40 manufacturing and technology research centers. Additional information about the company can be found at
WhirlpoolCorp.com
.

**The team you will be a part of**

The Global Information Technology team plays a strategic role in driving technology and digital transformation across the company. The Data and AI team is responsible for designing, delivering, and evolving technology solutions to improve data usage and drive long-term business results.

**This role in summary**

We are seeking a skilled Analytics Engineer to join our data team and bridge the gap between raw data and business-ready analytics. This role focuses on designing, building, and maintaining analytics-oriented data models and pipelines, ensuring reliable, well-structured data for dashboards, reports, and advanced analysis. The Analytics Engineer works closely with BI teams, data analysts, data scientists, and business stakeholders, transforming data into trusted analytical assets that support decision-making.

**Your responsibilities will include**

Designs and builds analytical data models prioritized by D&A (with support from the Analytics Lead and Data Product Owner);

Develops, tests, and maintains transformation logic (SQL/Dataform) across Silver and Gold layers;

Defines, documents, and maintains business KPIs and semantic definitions (single source of truth);

Performs and documents data validation tests (quality checks, reconciliation, metric validation);

Supports Data Product Owners (BI Teams and Data Science Teams) during UAT and metric validation;

Collaborates with Data Engineers to ensure reliable upstream data ingestion and proper modeling grain;

Supports analytical model deployment through pull requests and downstream validation.

Follows Data Architecture, Semantic Layer standards, and Data Governance policies.

Documents analytical models, business rules, and metric logic (Project documentation & Product documentation – KT);

Partners with BI teams to optimize datasets for reporting tools (Lookerstudio, Tableau, etc.);

Optimizes performance of analytical datasets (aggregations, partitioning strategy alignment, cost awareness);

Supports and trains Analytics/BI teams on new datasets, KPI definitions, and semantic models (KT);

Monitors data freshness, metric consistency, and business logic integrity post-deployment.

**Minimum requirements**

*Hands-on experience designing and maintaining analytical data models in*
***BigQuery***
*(Silver/Gold layers)*

*Strong proficiency in SQL (BigQuery or similar), including joins, window functions, aggregations, CTEs, and performance-aware query design;*

*Strong proficiency in*
***SQL for BigQuery***
*, including:*

- *Complex joins*
- *Window functions*
- *Aggregations*
- *CTEs*
- *Query performance optimization*
- *Cost-aware query design*

*Solid understanding of*
***Medallion Architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold)***

*Experience implementing*
***dimensional modeling (Star Schema)***
*:*

- *Fact and dimension tables*
- *Proper grain definition*
- *Surrogate keys*
- *Basic Slowly Changing Dimensions (SCD) concepts*

*Experience implementing*
***data quality validations***
*:*

- *Null checks*
- *Duplicate detection*
- *Referential integrity validation*
- *Reconciliation logic*

*Experience supporting*
***UAT with BI teams and business stakeholders***

*Working knowledge of*
***Cloud Composer (Airflow)***
*and data dependency orchestration concepts*

*Understanding of how analytical modeling decisions impact*
***Tableau (or similar BI tools)***
*performance*

*Proficiency with*
***Git-based workflows***
*, pull requests, and SQL code reviews*

*Working knowledge of*
***GCP fundamentals***
*:*

- *IAM roles*
- *Service accounts*
- *Dataset-level access control*
- *Basic cost governance awareness*

*Ability to document transformation logic, KPI definitions, and business rules following enterprise standards*

**Preferred skills and experiences**

*Exposure to*
***Dataflow and Pub/Sub***
*, understanding upstream ingestion patterns*

*Experience working with*
***SAP (ECC, BW, or S/4)***
*or enterprise ERP systems*

*Experience with*
***Dataform or structured SQL transformation frameworks***

*Experience optimizing*
***BigQuery performance***
*, including:*

- *Partitioning strategies*
- *Clustering*
- *Aggregated tables*
- *Cost optimization techniques*

*Exposure to*
***data governance and metric standardization practices***

*Experience working in*
***large-scale enterprise environments***

*Exposure to*
***data observability concepts***
*(freshness monitoring, reconciliation dashboards)*

*Experience participating in*
***Knowledge Transfer (KT)***
*activities and supporting sustain teams*

*Strong stakeholder communication skills*

***Professional working proficiency in English (preferred)***

*Exposure to*
***GenAI-assisted development tools***
*for SQL or documentation automation*

**What we offer**

1 day of work from home per week;

Flexible hours

“No dress code”

Gympass

Transportation allowance, bus, or free parking at the company

Meal allowance

On-site meals

Benefits such as payroll deduction or social loan, health insurance, dental insurance, life insurance, and a private pension plan compatible with the market;

Employee Support Program, with 24-hour assistance from legal, social, financial, and psychological assistants.

Childcare or nursery assistance at the company.

Services available on-site: beauty salon and aesthetics, an internal bank branch, laundry, a cafeteria, a restaurant, and a breastfeeding room.

Two weeks of remote work from anywhere;

After 5 years with the company, eligible employees can take four weeks of paid leave.

Discount on products through Compra Certa.

Discount on insurance (pet, car, home, bicycle, travel, and others);

Extended maternity/paternity leave.

**Connect with us and learn more about Whirlpool Corporation**

See what it's like to work at Whirlpool by visiting
Whirlpool Careers
. Additional information about the company can be found on
Facebook
,
Twitter
,
LinkedIn
,
Instagram
and
YouTube
.

Whirlpool Corporation is committed to equal employment opportunity and prohibits any discrimination on the basis of race or ethnicity, religion, sex, pregnancy, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, age, physical or mental disability, veteran status, or any other category protected by applicable law.

company_object.name: Whirlpool Corporation
company_object.long_description:
Life at home has been at the heart of our business for 112 years - it is why we exist and why we are passionate about what we do. Beginning with our founders to the everyday actions of our people, our values have always kept us grounded -- Integrity, Respect, Inclusion & Diversity, One Whirlpool, Spirit of Winning. What we do at Whirlpool Corporation matters because consumers trust our brands. We never take that for granted and we work every day to earn that trust as we are committed to being the best kitchen and laundry company, in constant pursuit of improving life at home.

ABOUT WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION 
Whirlpool Corporation (NYSE: WHR) is a leading kitchen and laundry appliance company, in constant pursuit of improving life at home and inspiring generations with our brands. The company is driving meaningful innovation to meet the evolving needs of consumers through its iconic brand portfolio, including Whirlpool, KitchenAid, JennAir, Maytag, Amana, Brastemp, Consul, and InSinkErator. In 2023, the company reported approximately $19 billion in annual sales, 59,000 employees, and 55 manufacturing and technology research centers.  Additional information about the company can be found at WhirlpoolCorp.com.
company_object.seo_description: Choose Whirlpool products and home appliances and trust they’ll handle your family’s chores with care. Find the right Whirlpool® Appliance to manage your needs.

data.job_title: Analista de Business Intelligence JR (Foco em Looker Studio)
data.description:
Somos uma empresa de tecnologia focada em proteção de marcas, monitoramento digital e compliance no ambiente online. Buscamos uma pessoa analítica e proativa para transformar grandes volumes de dados em dashboards estratégicos e intuitivos. Você será o braço direito das áreas de Marketing, Vendas e Operações, garantindo que a tomada de decisão seja baseada em evidências, utilizando o **Looker Studio** como principal vitrine de dados.

O que você vai encontrar ao fazer parte da Branddi:

**Startup em constante evolução:** Aqui, cada dia é uma nova oportunidade de aprender e crescer!

**Ambiente colaborativo e acolhedor:** Valorizamos e incentivamos novas ideias. Sua contribuição é essencial para nós!

**Espaço para inovação:** Buscamos sempre melhorar nossos processos e fluxos, e contamos com você para ajudar nesse processo de aprimoramento.

**Integração entre áreas:** Em nosso time, todos se conectam e colaboram, criando um ambiente dinâmico e alinhado.

**Flexibilidade:** Trabalhe de onde se sentir mais confortável com o nosso modelo de home-office e participe de reuniões de alinhamento para manter todos conectados.

 **Responsabilidades e atribuições**

- Construção de Dashboards: Desenvolver relatórios dinâmicos e intuitivos no Looker Studio que respondam a perguntas críticas de negócio.
- BigQuery: Ter compreensão de views/tabelas via SQL para servirem de fonte de dados limpa e performática para o Looker Studio.
- Conectores: Configurar e monitorar integrações (nativas e via parceiros) entre plataformas (Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, CRMs) e o ambiente de BI.
- Data Quality: Garantir a consistência dos dados, realizando cruzamentos e auditorias para que a interface reflita a realidade.
- Treinamento (Data Literacy): Apoiar o time interno na interpretação dos dashboards e na autonomia para consultas simples.

 **Requisitos e qualificações**

**Hard Skills**

- Domínio de Looker Studio: Experiência em campos calculados, filtros de dados, combinação de fontes (blending) e uso de temas personalizados.
- SQL Avançado: Experiência sólida (especialmente sintaxe Standard SQL do BigQuery) para manipulação e limpeza de dados.
- Noções de ETL/ELT: Conhecimento em processos de movimentação de dados - Diferencial para conhecimento em GO (Golang).

**Soft Skills**

- Data Storytelling: Capacidade de apresentar dados de forma visualmente atraente e fácil de entender por perfis não técnicos.
- Pensamento Crítico: Não apenas "puxar o dado", mas questionar se aquela métrica é a que realmente importa para o KPI da área.
- Resiliência: Lidar com APIs que mudam e conectores que podem apresentar instabilidade.

**Diferenciais**

- Experiência com **Looker (Pro/Enterprise)**.
- Certificações de Google Cloud ou Google Ads.
- Experiência com ferramentas de automação (n8n) para alertas de dados.

 **Informações adicionais**

- Modelo de trabalho 100% remoto.
- Ambiente de muito aprendizado, colaboração e crescimento.

A **Branddi** é uma empresa fundada em 2021, com o propósito de oferecer inteligência e inovação no monitoramento e análise de dados para campanhas digitais. Nosso foco está em proteger marcas e otimizar sua presença online, garantindo que nossas soluções ajudem nossos clientes a crescer de forma sustentável e segura.

Nossa solução é completa para proteger as maiores marcas do Brasil e do mundo. Identificamos e combatemos práticas de concorrência desleal, pirataria e qualquer abuso de marca em todas as plataformas digitais do mundo.

Acreditamos no poder da inteligência de mídia para proteger as marcas nos principais canais digitais

Pensada para atender as necessidades específicas de cada cliente, com uma tecnologia própria que evolui constantemente. Além disso, nosso time é composto por especialistas que não só analisam os dados, mas também orientam nossos clientes com estratégias para melhorar seu posicionamento digital.

Ao fazer parte do nosso time, você trabalhará em um ambiente focado na análise de dados, acompanhamento de métricas de performance e geração de insights. Aqui, cada desafio é visto como uma oportunidade de inovação, e valorizamos a colaboração entre diferentes áreas para entregar os melhores resultados aos nossos clientes.

Se você se identifica com nossa cultura, paixão por tecnologia e visão estratégica de crescimento, confira nossas vagas e venha fazer parte do time Branddi!
